summary: Iteration 55 - Regional Settings & Order Ratings Testing COMPLETE. All backend APIs (100% pass - 16/16 tests). Frontend UI for regional settings in Invoice Settings tab working correctly. Rating dialog implemented in order history view.

Backend: GET /api/system/languages - PASSED (5 languages: ar, en, ku, fa, tr)
Backend: GET /api/system/countries - PASSED (9 countries with default currency/language)
Backend: POST /api/convert-currency IQD to USD - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/convert-currency USD to SAR - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/convert-currency invalid currency returns 400 - PASSED

Backend: GET /api/customer/regional-settings/{tenant} by slug - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/customer/regional-settings/{tenant} invalid returns 404 - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/customer/rate-order invalid order returns 404 - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/customer/rate-order invalid rating handled - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/ratings/tenant-summary - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/customer/order-rating/{order_id} - PASSED
Backend: Protected endpoints require auth (401/403) - PASSED
Frontend: Regional Settings UI in Invoice Settings tab - PASSED

Frontend: Language selector - PASSED

critical_code_review_comments: Regional settings UI is well-implemented with country auto-changing currency and language
Rating dialog properly shows only for delivered/completed orders
All 10 currencies have proper exchange rates and decimal places configured
All 5 languages have proper RTL/LTR direction configured
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing demo data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All regional settings and rating features are working correctly. Regional settings UI is in the 'إعدادات الفاتورة' (Invoice Settings) tab in Settings page. Rating button appears in order history for delivered/completed orders. The rating dialog includes: overall rating (1-5 stars), food quality rating, delivery speed rating, service quality rating, and optional comment.

country_system.auto_currency_change: Changing country auto-updates currency and language

order_rating_system.rating_dialog_ui: Shows for delivered/completed orders in order history
